invalidation.zh: 资金费率Z-Score回升至-50%以上（空头压力缓解）或价格跌破125（基于ATR和关键支撑）。
invalidation.en: Funding rate Z-Score recovers above -50% (short pressure eases) or price breaks below 125 (based on ATR and key support).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破0.125（基于ATR和近期低点）或资金费率Z-Score升至75%以上（显示多头过热）。
invalidation.en: Price breaks below 0.125 (based on ATR and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 75% (indicating overheated longs).
